summary: PASS. The finalized source inventory indexes are present, hashed, internally consistent for file and worksheet row counts, fail closed for generator eligibility, queue stale/hidden/insufficient-identity worksheets appropriately, keep CAD and catalog candidates unapproved and human-review-only, preserve the no-baseline boundary, and are supported by passing Phase 0 harness and child-result validation evidence. The all-project project manifest contains one extra UNASSIGNED bucket row in addition to the 404 real project rows declared by project_count.
